gt_sql: SELECT t1.player_name FROM Player AS t1 INNER JOIN Player_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.player_api_id = t2.player_api_id ORDER BY t2.overall_rating DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT p.player_name
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
ORDER BY pa.overall_rating DESC
LIMIT 1
question: Which player has the strongest overall strength?
